headline: Motorola Solutions (MSI) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of public safety technology company Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) jumped 2.7% in the afternoon session after the company announced that Peter Leav, a senior advisor at TPG, was appointed to its board of directors.

headline: Why Is Motorola (MSI) Up 2% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Motorola (MSI) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Brush Off
summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.

raw.headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Brush Off
